meta.name: S1 UX Guide Canonical Token Architecture Draft
meta.description: 3-layer canonical token naming architecture draft. Foundation → Semantic → Component. Based on legacy audit (419 vars), existing registry JSON, and confirmed tokens.css state as of 2026-05-18.
prohibitions: Figma Variable rename/write/delete prohibited in this step
Legacy token deletion prohibited in this step
Canonical names are DRAFT — not confirmed as final

foundation.description: Foundation raw values. HEX/px/number only. No CSS variable references. Single source of truth for all downstream layers.

colorGroups.note: Universal constants. Used in Semantic inverse/white tokens.
CI/logo only. Do not reference directly in product UI tokens.
Primary neutral scale. Dark steps: 0=darkest → 900=lightest (inverted direction). Gray-dark-450 NOT defined — gap between 400 and 500.
Light-only decorative scale. No dark counterpart defined.
Aliases of dark scale step-350 values. Used only by semantic status tokens in dark mode.

semantic.description: Role-based tokens. Light values in :root, dark overrides in [data-theme='dark']. Component tokens MUST reference this layer for colors.

colorBg.note: Light value is raw HEX — not a foundation foundation. Needs Foundation registration or replacement with closest gray step.

colorText.l4_5_value_mismatch_resolved: HD-L4.5-B 확정(2026-05-19): canonical #202020 유지. Figma color/text/title/primary = #000000은 doc-only(스타일가이드 문서 노드). UI 컴포넌트 binding 아님. 토큰 변경 없음.

colorText.role: Input placeholder. Confirmed gray/500 (#757575) per MVP-T1.

colorText.note: Dark value #35363F. Candidate upgrade to #55575F (gray-dark-600). Human decision needed.

colorBorder.note: Dark rgba — Figma opacity composition. Needs resolved HEX or foundation dark alias. Human decision.
Dark rgba — same issue as subtle.
Light same as border-default. Dark same as border-default (candidate until rgba resolved).

colorStatus.note: Light uses blue by service convention.

colorControlBorder.description: Checkbox·Radio·Toggle border — independent from general divider border. Added MVP4.4 (2026-05-18).

colorFormControl.description: Shared semantic layer for Input, Select, DatePicker, TimePicker. Added MVP4-token (2026-05-18).
colorFormControl.usageEvidence: F0: Input(540:3794) + DatePicker(540:3836, 6456:4033) 공통 사용 확인. Select/Textarea/TimePicker rescan-needed — MCP접근 실패(ACCESS-01). F0 partial scan 기준 8개 중 2개 component에서 확인됨.
colorFormControl.l4_5_notes: F0+C0 합산 결과 semantic 유지 타당. Select/Textarea/TimePicker가 동일 form-control 레이어를 사용하는지 추가 확인 필요(Plugin Export 또는 직접 Figma 확인).

tokens.note: Focus state of form control. Figma 'selected' = code 'focus'.
Input typed text. gray/800 (#353535) confirmed per MVP-T1.

colorTextState.description: Form helper/feedback text state tokens. Added MVP4-token (2026-05-18).

l4_5_rename_resolved.resolution: HD-L4.5-C 확정(2026-05-19): --color-text-inverse의 alias로 처리. 값 동일(#ffffff). 별도 CSS token 신설 없음. Figma Variable 이름은 유지(변경 금지). code registry에서 color/text/state/accent-alt → --color-text-inverse 매핑으로 문서화.

colorOverlay.note: rgba allowed — alpha channel cannot use foundation foundation.

component.description: Component-scoped tokens. Color tokens MUST reference Semantic layer (never Foundation directly). Size/spacing may reference Foundation directly if component-exclusive.

button.usageEvidence: F0: color/button/bg/primary--default, color/button/border/primary--default, color/button/label/primary--default — 3개 노드(540:4501 button-primary, 540:3836 datepicker_mobile, 6456:4033 DatePicker Section2)에서 확인. button 전용 사용. semantic 경유 가능 확인: value=#1d6ceb = --color-action-primary-default.
button.l4_5_notes: button component variables는 button 전용 사용으로 확인됨. semantic --color-action-primary-* 계열로 교체 가능하나 Figma Variable 단계에서 component-alias 구조가 이미 존재. canonical 분류: component-alias-candidate.

ghost.note: Deprecated. Use blue-line instead. Kept in tokens.css for backward compatibility only.

chip.note: MD (component-tokens-extracted.md) defines line/solid 2-type separation. tokens.css uses unified structure. Structure decision pending.

tokens.notes: C0 pilot에서 발견. Select 컴포넌트에서 사용 중. canonical-token-draft에 미등록 상태였음. form-control 계열과 일관성 확보.
C0 pilot에서 발견. 선택된 옵션 값 표시 텍스트. primary text로 표시.
C0 pilot에서 발견. dropdown list panel 외곽선. components.html에서 사용 중.
C0 pilot에서 발견. 선택된 옵션 항목의 강조 텍스트 색상.

input.note: 2-layer: --input-* → --color-form-control-* → Semantic. hover/focus/error bg removed per HD-2/3/8. filled state: NO separate bg/border token — identical to default. filled is a content state (placeholder text → typed value). See aliases.complete→filled.

tokens.note: Stray Select token (HD-5, ND-8). L4.5 action: move to Select component registry once select.json is created.

aliases.rule: Figma 'complete' state = code 'filled'. No separate bg/border — visually same as default. Only text differs.
Figma 'selected' (form-control context) = code 'focus'. NOT the same as item selection. Only applies to Input/Select focus state.
Figma 'success' feedback = code 'correct'. 'correct' is canonical. Do not rename tokens to 'success'.
Filled state bg is identical to default bg. No separate token needed.
Filled state border is identical to default border. No separate token needed.
correct border visually equals selected/focus border. Kept as separate named token for semantic clarity.

deprecatedCandidates.reason: Ghost variant deprecated in favor of blue-line (2026-05-11). Kept in tokens.css for backward compatibility only.
deprecatedCandidates.action: Do NOT remove until all consumer code is migrated.

deprecatedCandidates.reason: Danger variant deleted (2026-04-29). Not in V2.4 official token set.
deprecatedCandidates.migration: No migration path. Do not recreate.

deprecatedCandidates.reason: HD-2: Figma does not define hover bg for input. Removed 2026-05-12.
deprecatedCandidates.migration: No replacement. Input has no hover background state.

deprecatedCandidates.reason: HD-2: Figma does not define hover border for input. Removed 2026-05-12.
HD-3: Focus bg = default bg. No visual difference. Removed 2026-05-12.
HD-8: Error bg = default bg (white). No visual difference. Removed 2026-05-12.
HD-5: Belongs to Select component, not Input. Stray token in input section.
deprecatedCandidates.migration: Will move to registry/components/select.json when Select component is registered.

duplicates.assessment: Same resolved value in light mode. Different semantic roles (placeholder vs caption). Kept as separate tokens intentionally.
Identical values. Different semantic roles (focus ring vs correct-state border). Kept separate for semantic clarity.
duplicates.action: No change needed. May consolidate in future if design confirms identical treatment.

duplicates.assessment: Same value. Different semantic roles. Intentionally separate.
Same light value. Different dark values (default: rgba 0.07, disabled: rgba 0.07 — also same in dark). Redundant pair.
duplicates.action: Needs decision: Should border-disabled be a separate token or alias of border-default?

duplicates.assessment: 3-level alias chain. input-focus-border → form-control-border-selected → border-focus. Intentional 2-layer architecture. Not a bug.
duplicates.action: No change. Chain depth is by design.

needsDecision.title: --color-gray-dark-450 undefined → resolved
needsDecision.description: tokens.css dark override for --dropdown-trigger-hover-bg was referencing var(--color-gray-dark-450), which does NOT exist in Foundation foundation.

needsDecision.title: Dark border rgba → Foundation dark scale
needsDecision.description: Replaced 5 dark border rgba values with Foundation gray-dark scale references. rgba exception for border removed from project rules.
needsDecision.resolution: subtle→gray-dark-200, default→gray-dark-300, disabled→gray-dark-200, strong→gray-dark-500, emphasis→gray-dark-700. tokens.css + semantic.colors.json updated to stable. 2026-05-18.

needsDecision.title: --color-text-disabled dark = var(--color-gray-dark-400)
needsDecision.description: Confirmed: keep current dark value var(--color-gray-dark-400) = #35363F. Candidate upgrade to gray-dark-600 (#55575F) rejected.
needsDecision.resolution: var(--color-gray-dark-400) confirmed. No change to tokens.css. 2026-05-18.

needsDecision.title: --color-bg-home light is raw HEX
needsDecision.description: --color-bg-home light = #F5F6FB, which is not a Foundation foundation. Either register it as a new gray step or replace with closest available foundation.
options: A: Register --color-home-bg or similar as a new foundation foundation

needsDecision.title: Chip structure: line/solid split adopted
needsDecision.description: Unified --chip-* tokens replaced with --chip-line-* (17) and --chip-solid-* (17) variants per Figma definition and component-tokens-extracted.md.
needsDecision.resolution: tokens.css chip section replaced: 17 unified → 34 split tokens. component-tokens-extracted.md updated with hover + icon + close-icon rows. 2026-05-18.

needsDecision.title: --chip-focus-ring removed
needsDecision.description: Button focus-ring policy (미정의) aligned to chip — removed for consistency.

needsDecision.title: semantic.colors.json missing newer semantic layers
needsDecision.description: registry/tokens/semantic.colors.json was last updated 2026-05-11. It does NOT include: --color-border-disabled, --color-control-border-*, --color-form-control-*, --color-text-state-*. These exist in tokens.css but are not registered in the JSON.
options: A: Update semantic.colors.json to include all 61 semantic color tokens
B: Create separate registry files: control-border.json, form-control.json, text-state.json

needsDecision.title: --select-disabled-border location
needsDecision.description: Per HD-5, --select-disabled-border should be in Select component registry, not Input. Currently in tokens.css input section. Needs relocating when Select component is registered.
needsDecision.action: Create registry/components/select.json and move this token.
needsDecision.requiredBy: Claude (after Human approves Select component registration)
